languages.text: "Проверьте, Ваша Светлость. Я готов{mf||а} рискнуть жизнью, чтобы доказать вам свою правоту".

traits.locale_text: "Попробуйте, господин. Я готов{mf||а} рискнуть жизнью, чтобы доказать вам свою правоту".

languages.text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."
languages.original_text: "Проверьте, Ваша Светлость. Я готов{mf||а} рискнуть жизнью, чтобы доказать вам свою правоту".

traits.locale_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."
"See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."
"See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

languages.text: “您可以亲自验证，大人。我愿意以性命担保我所言非虚。”
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: “您可以亲自验证，大人。我愿意以性命担保我所言非虚。”

languages.text: « Voyez par vous-même, Votre Seigneurie. Je suis {mf|prêt|prête} à risquer ma vie pour prouver que je dis la vérité. »
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: « Voyez par vous-même, Votre Seigneurie. Je suis {mf|prêt|prête} à risquer ma vie pour prouver que je dis la vérité. »

languages.text: «Sea testigo, milord. Estoy dispuest{mf|o|a} a jugarme la vida para demostrar que digo la verdad».
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: «Sea testigo, milord. Estoy dispuest{mf|o|a} a jugarme la vida para demostrar que digo la verdad».

languages.text: "Kendin gör. Doğruyu söylediğimi kanıtlamak için hayatımı riske atmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Kendin gör. Doğruyu söylediğimi kanıtlamak için hayatımı riske atmaya hazırım."

languages.text: "Seht selbst, Eure Lordschaft. Ich bin bereit, mein Leben zu riskieren, um zu beweisen, dass ich die Wahrheit sage."
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Seht selbst, Eure Lordschaft. Ich bin bereit, mein Leben zu riskieren, um zu beweisen, dass ich die Wahrheit sage."

languages.text: 「ご自身で確かめてください。真実を証明するために命を危険にさらす覚悟です。」
languages.original_text: "See for yourself, Your Lordship. I am willing to risk my life to prove I am telling the truth."

traits.locale_text: 「ご自身で確かめてください。真実を証明するために命を危険にさらす覚悟です。」
